Description: Parent station ID. Assigned by spatial buffer analysis in Step 2 using progressively expanding buffers at 150 ft / 300 ft / 500 ft / 1000 ft. Manual corrections applied in Step 3 via the reviewed Excel workbook. All records are guaranteed to have a valid station_id before export.
GTFS location type. All records in this layer are location_type = 0 (Stop or Platform). See https://gtfs.org/documentation/schedule/reference/#stopstxt for reference.
Stop name from GTFS or the curated GDB layer (`GDB_STOPS_LAYER` in `config.py`).
Transit agency short code. BA = BART, CT = Caltrain, AC = AC Transit, SC = VTA, SF = SFMTA.
GTFS route short name or number for the route(s) serving this stop.
GTFS route type. Key values used in this dataset: 0 = Tram/Streetcar/Light Rail, 1 = Subway/Metro, 2 = Rail.
SB79 tier designation. Tier 1: heavy rail or very high-frequency commuter rail (≥ 72 trains/day). Tier 2: light rail, high-frequency commuter rail (≥ 48 trains/day), or BRT.
